California Rifle and Pistol Association, Inc.
FIREARMS FREEDOM FUND, INC.
DBA / SPORTSMEN'S LEGISLATIVE COMMITTEE
555 Capitol Mall • Suite 455 • Sacramento, California 95814
(916) 446-3515 FAX (916) 448-7469

John W. Sherburn
President

Bill J. Chapman
Vice President

Lorena V. Barr
Secretary/Treasurer

Gerald H. Upholt
Manager - Governmental Affairs

June 5, 1990

Wayne Imberi
Consultant
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Suite 600
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Mr. Imberi:

Enclosed is a copy of the completed and filed Form 410, Statement
of Organization, for the California Rifle and Pistol Association/
Sportsmen's Legislative Committee Political Action Committee
(CRPA/SLC PAC).

As we have discussed in the past, there is a concern over whether
the California Rifle and Pistol Association, Inc. (CRPA, Inc.) must
be listed as a sponsor because of solicitations for contributions
which may be placed in its monthly membership newspaper by the
CRPA/SLC PAC. This situation is described in more detail in the
attachment to the Form 410.

CRPA, Inc., does not want to be listed as a sponsor if it is not
absolutely necessary because it has no involvement with the PAC and
does not want to create an erroneous impression that it does. The
true sponsor is the Firearms Freedom Fund, Inc. (FFF, Inc.).

It would be very much appreciated if, after reviewing the matter,
you could render a written opinion as to whether CRPA, Inc., also
must be listed as a sponsor.

If you require more information or have any questions which I may
be helpful in answering, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Thank you once again for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Gerald H. Upholt
Manager - Governmental Affairs

GHU;mr

enclosure

MARCH FONG EU, Secretary of State

446-3531

I TREASURER AND OTHER PRINCIPAL OFFICERS

NAME AND ADDRESS AND MAILING ADDRESS, IF DIFFERENT

(AREA
CODE)

BUSINESS
PHONE NO.

TREASURER

Larry Wilkins
1160 Regier Ave., San Leandro, CA 94577

(415) 562-7651

Attach additional information on appropriately labeled continuation sheets.

II

IS THIS A BROAD BASED POLITICAL COMMITTEE? (See definition and important information on reverse.)

☐ YES

Enter the date on or before which the committee qualified as a broad
based committee:

☒ NO

III IS THIS COMMITTEE CONTROLLED BY A CANDIDATE, OFFICEHOLDER OR STATE MEASURE PROPONENT? (See
definition and important information on reverse.)

☐ YES (Complete the following)

☒ NO

IF THIS COMMITTEE IS CONTROLLED BY AN OFFICEHOLDER OR A CANDIDATE, THE NAME OF THE CONTROLLING CANDIDATE OR OFFICEHOLDER, THE
ELECTIVE OFFICE SOUGHT OR HELD AND DISTRICT NUMBER, IF ANY, MUST BE LISTED. IF THIS IS A BALLOT MEASURE CONTROLLED BY
MORE THAN ONE CANDIDATE, THE NAME OF EACH CONTROLLING CANDIDATE MUST BE LISTED. IF THIS COMMITTEE IS CONTROLLED BY A STATE
MEASURE PROPONENT, THE NAME OF THE STATE MEASURE PROPONENT MUST BE LISTED.

Attach additional information on appropriately labeled continuation sheets.

IV IS THIS COMMITTEE ACTING JOINTLY WITH OTHER COMMITTEES?

☐ YES (Complete the following)

☒ NO

NAMES OF COMMITTEES WITH WHICH THIS COMMITTEE ACTS JOINTLY. ALSO PROVIDE THE COMMITTEES' IDENTIFICATION NUMBERS OR THE
TREASURERS' NAMES AND PERMANENT STREET ADDRESSES.

Attach additional information on appropriately labeled continuation sheets.

YOU MUST COMPLETE THE VERIFICATION ON PAGE 2
For information required to be provided to you pursuant to the Information Practices Act of 1977, (see "Information Manual on Campaign Disclosure"

NAME OF
COMMITTEE

California Rifle and Pistol Association/ Sportsmen's Legislative Committee
Political Action Committee

V IS THIS A SPONSORED COMMITTEE? (Refer to the instructions on the reverse side for definitions and rules regarding
the name of a sponsored committee.)

☐ NO
☒ YES (Provide name and address of sponsor; if the committee has more than one sponsor, provide the name and
address of each sponsor on an attachment.)

Name of Sponsor:California Rifle and Pistol Association/Sportsmen's Legislative Committee
Address of Sponsor: 555 Capitol Mall, #455 Sacramento, CA 95814

VI IF PRIMARILY FORMED TO SUPPORT OR OPPOSE SPECIFIC CANDIDATES OR MEASURES, LIST SPECIFIC
CANDIDATES OR MEASURES SUPPORTED OR OPPOSED.

CANDIDATE'S NAME/MEASURE'S FULL TITLE
INCLUDING BALLOT NUMBER OR LETTER

SUPPORT OPPOSE

OFFICE SOUGHT OR HELD BY CANDIDATE OR MEASURE'S
JURISDICTION (Include district number, city or county, as applicable)

Attach additional information on appropriately labeled continuation sheets.

VII COMMITTEE'S PRINCIPAL ACTIVITY IF NOT SUPPORTING OR OPPOSING SPECIFIC CANDIDATES OR MEASURES -- PLEASE
CHECK BOX TO INDICATE THE COMMITTEE'S LEVEL OF ACTIVITY: ☐CITY ☐COUNTY ☒STATE

Support of candidates for election to the State Legislature and

statewide offices who support the goals and objectives of the

California Rifle and Pistol Association.

Attach additional information on appropriately labeled continuation sheets.

VIII YOU MUST SPECIFY WHAT DISPOSITION WILL BE MADE OF SURPLUS FUNDS IN THE EVENT OF TERMINATION.

The Political Action Committee will comply with the laws and

regulations in effect at the time of termination.

VERIFICATION

I HAVE USED ALL REASONABLE DILIGENCE IN PREPARING THIS STATEMENT. I HAVE REVIEWED THE STATEMENT AND TO THE BEST OF MY KNOWLEDGE THE
INFORMATION CONTAINED HEREIN IS TRUE AND COMPLETE.

I CERTIFY UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY UNDER THE LAWS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA THAT THE FOREGOING IS TRUE AND CORRECT.

EXECUTED ON 5/24/90 AT SACRAMENTO, CALIF. BY [Signature]
(DATE) (CITY AND STATE) (SIGNATURE OF TREASURER)

EXECUTED ON _____________ AT _________________________ BY_________________________________
(DATE) (CITY AND STATE) (SIGNATURE OF CONTROLLING CANDIDATE, OFFICEHOLDER OR STATE MEASURE PROPONENT)

EXECUTED ON _____________ AT _________________________ BY_________________________________
(DATE) (CITY AND STATE) (SIGNATURE OF CONTROLLING CANDIDATE, OFFICEHOLDER OR STATE MEASURE PROPONENT)

EXECUTED ON _____________ AT _________________________ BY_________________________________
(DATE) (CITY AND STATE) (SIGNATURE OF CONTROLLING CANDIDATE, OFFICEHOLDER OR STATE MEASURE PROPONENT)

Page 1 of 1

Attachment - #1 of 1
Form 410 - Statement of Organization
California Rifle and Pistol Association/
Sportsmen's Legislative Committee Political Action Committee

V. The Firearms Freedom Fund, Inc. (FFF, Inc.), does business as
(dba) the California Rifle and Pistol Association/Sportsmen's Leg-
islative Committee (CRPA/SLC) in the conduct of its governmental
affairs activities and thus is known publicly by this name. It is
the sponsor of the California Rifle and Pistol Association/Sportsmens Legislative Committee Political Action Committee (CRPA/SLC
PAC).

The California Rifle and Pistol Association, Inc. (CRPA, Inc.), is
a totally separate and distinct organization from either FFF, Inc.
or the CRPA/SLC PAC, and does not engage in any program of governmental affairs activities. It is a statewide non-profit membership
organization formed principally for the purpose of promoting competitive marksmanship, firearms education, training, safety, and
other activities related to the lawful possession and use of firearms.

Because of the similarity in names, there is occasional confusion
over the differences in identity between FFF, Inc. (dba: CRPA/SLC)
and CRPA, Inc.

It is anticipated that the formation of the CRPA/SLC PAC may also
result in some confusion amongst those who are not familiar with
the three organizations and the differences between them.

Additionally, CRPA/SLC PAC plans, from time to time, to place advertisements soliciting contributions or articles describing its
recent pac activities in the CRPA, Inc.'s monthly membership newspaper, The Firing Line. This had led to a question of whether CRPA,
Inc., in addition to CRPA/SLC, must also be listed as a sponsor on
the Form 410. There is a good possibility that the majority of contributed funds will come from the membership of CRPA, Inc., even
though CRPA, Inc., has no direct tie to the PAC and is not, itself,
soliciting contributions. It was also questioned if it would make
a difference whether The Firing Line space is donated to the CRPA/
SLC PAC by CRPA, Inc. or is sold to it as paid advertisement space.

These questions were submitted orally to the State Fair Political
Practices Commission (FPPC) staff whose immediate reaction was that
CRPA, Inc., need not be listed as a sponsor on the Form 410, but
that an explanation of the relationship of the three organizations
and a notice of CRPA/SLC PAC's intentions to solicit the membership
of CRPA, Inc., through advertisements and articles in The Firing
Line should be included. Therefore, this explanation has been drafted as an attachment to the CRPA/SLC PAC Form 410.

If the FPPC staff determines after further review that CRPA, Inc.,
should also be officially listed as a sponsor, an amendment to the
Form 410 will then be filed.

As we have discussed in the past, there is a concern over whether the California Rifle and Pistol Association, Inc. (CRPA, Inc.) must be listed as a sponsor because of solicitations for contributions which may be placed in its monthly membership newspaper by the CRPA/SLC PAC. This situation is described in more detail in the attachment to the Form 410. CRPA, Inc., does not want to be listed as a sponsor if it is not absolutely necessary because it has no involvement with the PAC and does not want to create an erroneous impression that it does. The true sponsor is the Firearms Freedom Fund, Inc. (FFF, Inc.). It would be very much appreciated if, after reviewing the matter, you could render a written opinion as to whether CRPA, Inc., also must be listed as a sponsor. If you require more information or have any questions which I may be helpful in answering, please do not hesitate to contact me. Thank you once again for your assistance. Sincerely, Gerald H. 1160 Regier Ave., San Leandro, CA 94577 | (415) | 562-7651 | **II IS THIS A BROAD BASED POLITICAL COMMITTEE?** [X] NO **III IS THIS COMMITTEE CONTROLLED BY A CANDIDATE, OFFICEHOLDER OR STATE MEASURE PROPOSER?** [X] NO **IV IS THIS COMMITTEE ACTING JOINTLY WITH OTHER COMMITTEES?** [X] NO The form also includes instructions to file an original and one copy with the Secretary of State, Political Reform Division, and to provide additional information on labeled continuation sheets if necessary. This form is related to the California Rifle and Pistol Association/Sportsmen's Legislative Committee Political Action Committee.
